direction: reuse caller-computed wave speed in OSHER instead of recomputing sqrt
rationale: CalculateFluxKernel already computes CL and CL1 as sqrt(9.81 * H) to form FIL before each OSHER call, but OSHER recomputes the same wave speed from its depth argument for branch classification. Passing the already computed wave speed removes a redundant sqrt per OSHER call while preserving the same comparison value and operand order elsewhere.
